MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And Enter Judgment

Plaintiff withdrew its "motion to set aside dismissal and enter judgment" by a notice filed December 22, 2021, so the motion is moot.
